rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE LAMARCUS GREGORY SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #3, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/21/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (2) When an accounting is presented, original bank or brokerage statements must be filed to verify the ending balance(s) shown in the accounting. None appears to have been filed. [LRSF 14.34 D.] See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. (3) The petition does not appear to have been correctly (fully) verified. The verification is not dated. (The petition and accounting have not yet been fully reviewed, as no courtesy copy was provided. [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B.]) Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 5/7/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF LARRY MAH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1. Conservator/Petitioner withdraws the relief of periodic payment by filing a supplement with no corresponding proof of service, which does not seem appropriate. CRC 7.3 and 7.53. - The Court to determine. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PIRKKO STENSSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Granted per written order (bond is increased to $1,153,000). Status of filing proof of the additional $263,000 bond will be set for 5/7/25. Status of filing a petition for final distribution or a further report of status of administration will be set for 6/30/25. NB: Recovery on bond applies to conservators and guardians. Also, 2% of the amount over $1,000,000 would have been $3,042.40. Probate Code Section 12200 requires a "report of status of administration," not a "status report," which is vague. If accounting is not waived, the first two-year accounting is already overdue.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LILLIE MAE TYLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/07/2025. A review of the DE-121 form filed on 03/28/2025 indicates that the following issues must be addressed: i) The county was not specified in the caption. ii) The decedent's name must be specified in the caption (as part of document title) and at item 1. iii) Items 2 and 3 must be completed. iv) Items 2 and 3 of the proof of service must be completed. v) The proof of service must be signed by someone other than petitioner. vi) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. In addition, nothing has been filed to address the following issues (e-mailed to petitioner on 03/05/2025): 1) An amended DE-147 form must be filed to list petitioner's telephone number at item 2 of Acknowledgment of Receipt on page 2. 2) No proof of publication is on file. 3) Item 2 of the petition: Petitioner's name must be specified. 4) Item 2b: i) The name of the proposed personal representative must be specified. ii) At least one box must be checked. (3) must be checked for letters of administration. 5) Item 2d: At least one box must be checked. 6) Item 3c must be completed. 7) Item 3f(1) must be checked if the decedent died intestate. 8) Item 3g(2)(a) must be checked if petitioner is the decedent's child/heir. 9) Item 3g(4) must be unchecked. 10) Item 4 must be unchecked if the decedent died intestate. 11) Item 5a(1) or (2) must be checked. If (2) is checked, (a) or (b) must be checked. If (b) is checked, please provide the name and date of death of the decedent's spouse. 12) Item 5a(3) or (4) must be checked. 13) Item 5a(7) or (8) must be checked. 14) Item 5b: At least one box must be checked. 15) Item 8: The relationship to the decedent must be specified for each person.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JUANITA ELEANOR CHECCHI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing for the sole purpose of admitting the will dated 11/1/19. [Probate Code Section 8225.] No appearance is required, although the petitioner's name was misspelled in several places. Status hearing will be set for 4/20/26. If a petition for final distribution or a report of status with a petition requesting additional time for estate administration is filed at least two weeks before 4/20/26, no appearance will be required on that date. NB: Please show the hearing date on cover letters or courtesy copies of filed papers.
